title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: AIADMK takes the lion’s share of advantageous seats
description: Of the remaining 19 Assembly segments, the BJP and the Pattali Makkal Katchi (PMK) have been allotted eight each with one each to the Indhiya Jananayaga Katchi (IJK), Puratchi Bharatham and the Tamizhaga Makkal Munnetra Kazhagam (TMMK).
